issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' for Penguin, but card text says 'If you don't have [Penguin]' which typically means in hand or general possession, not specifically on board. The condition logic appears incorrect for the intended meaning.

Filter specifies 'subType:Heart Pirates' but card text says 'play up to 1 [Penguin]'. The filter should target cards with name 'Penguin', not a subtype. Penguin is a creature name, not a subtype classification.
Action should include quantity limit 'up to 1' in the action parameters.
